criteria.reason: Runner recognizes Maton external account bridge contracts from blueprint metadata.
Safe preview creates a Maton delivery artifact without calling dispatch.
Production dispatch requires prior approval plus explicit dispatch mode and side-effect permission.
Approved dispatch uses the existing channel router Maton bridge.
Maton delivery artifacts record route, policy, router result, and external dispatch status.
Focused tests, full agent blueprint suite, and frontend build passed.

commands_run: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_agent_blueprint_layer.py -k 'maton_delivery or openclaw_preview_observations or creates_drafts_after_shortlist' -x
